psalm-89-1.verse:
I will sing of the lovingkindness of the Lord forever;
  To all generations I will make known Your faithfulness with my mouth.
psalm-89-1.prayer: Lord, I will sing of Your lovingkindness forever. Help me continually remember and declare Your faithfulness.

psalm-89-2.verse:
For I have said, “Lovingkindness will be built up forever;
  In the heavens You will establish Your faithfulness.”
psalm-89-2.prayer: Father, Your love stands firm forever and Your faithfulness reaches beyond what I can see. Help me trust Your promises.

psalm-89-3.verse:
“I have made a covenant with My chosen;
  I have sworn to David My servant,
psalm-89-3.prayer: Lord, thank You for making and keeping Your covenant. Remind me that Your word is trustworthy and secure.

psalm-89-4.verse:
I will establish your seed forever
  And build up your throne to all generations.” Selah.
psalm-89-4.prayer: Father, establish what You have promised according to Your perfect will. Strengthen my confidence in Your plans.

psalm-89-5.verse:
The heavens will praise Your wonders, O Lord;
  Your faithfulness also in the assembly of the holy ones.
psalm-89-5.prayer: Lord, let the heavens praise Your wonders and let my life join in declaring Your faithfulness.

psalm-89-6.verse:
For who in the skies is comparable to the Lord?
  Who among the sons of the mighty is like the Lord,
psalm-89-6.prayer: Father, there is no one like You. Help me worship You with awe and reverence.

psalm-89-7.verse:
A God greatly feared in the council of the holy ones,
  And awesome above all those who are around Him?
psalm-89-7.prayer: Lord, You are greatly feared and honored among Your people. Teach me to approach You with humility and respect.

psalm-89-8.verse:
O Lord God of hosts, who is like You, O mighty Lord?
  Your faithfulness also surrounds You.
psalm-89-8.prayer: Father, thank You for Your unmatched power and faithfulness. Help me trust You above every earthly strength.

psalm-89-9.verse:
You rule the swelling of the sea;
  When its waves rise, You still them.
psalm-89-9.prayer: Lord, You rule over the raging sea. Speak peace over every storm in my life.

psalm-89-10.verse:
You Yourself crushed Rahab like one who is slain;
  You scattered Your enemies with Your mighty arm.
psalm-89-10.prayer: Father, You defeat what opposes Your will. Strengthen me to trust Your victory and power.

psalm-89-11.verse:
The heavens are Yours, the earth also is Yours;
  The world and all it contains, You have founded them.
psalm-89-11.prayer: Lord, heaven and earth belong to You. Help me remember that all creation is under Your authority.

psalm-89-12.verse:
The north and the south, You have created them;
  Tabor and Hermon shout for joy at Your name.
psalm-89-12.prayer: Father, thank You for the beauty and strength of Your creation. Let it continually remind me of Your greatness.

psalm-89-13.verse:
You have a strong arm;
  Your hand is mighty, Your right hand is exalted.
psalm-89-13.prayer: Lord, Your arm is mighty and Your hand is strong. Help me rely on Your power instead of my own.

psalm-89-14.verse:
Righteousness and justice are the foundation of Your throne;
  Lovingkindness and truth go before You.
psalm-89-14.prayer: Father, righteousness and justice are the foundation of Your throne. Let truth and mercy shape my life.

psalm-89-15.verse:
How blessed are the people who know the joyful sound!
  O Lord, they walk in the light of Your countenance.
psalm-89-15.prayer: Lord, blessed are those who walk in the light of Your presence. Help me live daily in fellowship with You.

psalm-89-16.verse:
In Your name they rejoice all the day,
  And by Your righteousness they are exalted.
psalm-89-16.prayer: Father, let my joy be found in Your name and not in temporary things.

psalm-89-17.verse:
For You are the glory of their strength,
  And by Your favor our horn is exalted.
psalm-89-17.prayer: Lord, You are the glory of our strength. Help me depend on You for every victory and accomplishment.

psalm-89-18.verse:
For our shield belongs to the Lord,
  And our king to the Holy One of Israel.
psalm-89-18.prayer: Father, thank You for being my shield and protector. Keep me secure in Your care.

psalm-89-19.prayer: Lord, thank You for raising up servants according to Your purpose. Help me faithfully fulfill what You call me to do.

psalm-89-20.verse:
I have found David My servant;
  With My holy oil I have anointed him,
psalm-89-20.prayer: Father, thank You for choosing and anointing those who serve You. Let me walk faithfully in my calling.

psalm-89-21.verse:
With whom My hand will be established;
  My arm also will strengthen him.
psalm-89-21.prayer: Lord, strengthen me with Your hand and establish me through Your grace.

psalm-89-22.verse:
The enemy will not deceive him,
  Nor the son of wickedness afflict him.
psalm-89-22.prayer: Father, protect me from the attacks of the enemy and keep me secure in Your truth.

psalm-89-23.verse:
But I shall crush his adversaries before him,
  And strike those who hate him.
psalm-89-23.prayer: Lord, defeat what opposes Your purposes and help me remain steadfast in faith.

psalm-89-24.verse:
My faithfulness and My lovingkindness will be with him,
  And in My name his horn will be exalted.
psalm-89-24.prayer: Father, let Your faithfulness and lovingkindness remain upon me throughout every season.

psalm-89-25.verse:
I shall also set his hand on the sea
  And his right hand on the rivers.
psalm-89-25.prayer: Lord, expand my influence only according to Your will and for Your glory.

psalm-89-26.verse:
He will cry to Me, ‘You are my Father,
  My God, and the rock of my salvation.’
psalm-89-26.prayer: Father, help me call upon You as my Father, my God, and the rock of my salvation.

psalm-89-27.verse:
I also shall make him My firstborn,
  The highest of the kings of the earth.
psalm-89-27.prayer: Lord, thank You for giving honor according to Your purpose. Keep me humble before You.

psalm-89-28.verse:
My lovingkindness I will keep for him forever,
  And My covenant shall be confirmed to him.
psalm-89-28.prayer: Father, thank You that Your covenant love endures forever. Help me trust in Your faithfulness.

psalm-89-29.verse:
So I will establish his descendants forever
  And his throne as the days of heaven.
psalm-89-29.prayer: Lord, establish what honors You and let future generations know of Your goodness.

psalm-89-30.verse:
“If his sons forsake My law
  And do not walk in My judgments,
psalm-89-30.prayer: Father, when I wander from Your ways, lovingly correct me and draw me back to obedience.

psalm-89-31.verse:
If they violate My statutes
  And do not keep My commandments,
psalm-89-31.prayer: Lord, keep me from neglecting Your commands and help me walk faithfully before You.

psalm-89-32.verse:
Then I will punish their transgression with the rod
  And their iniquity with stripes.
psalm-89-32.prayer: Father, thank You that Your discipline comes from love and a desire to restore.

psalm-89-33.verse:
But I will not break off My lovingkindness from him,
  Nor deal falsely in My faithfulness.
psalm-89-33.prayer: Lord, even when I fail, thank You that Your lovingkindness does not depart from me.

psalm-89-34.verse:
My covenant I will not violate,
  Nor will I alter the utterance of My lips.
psalm-89-34.prayer: Father, Your word never fails. Help me trust every promise You have spoken.

psalm-89-35.verse:
Once I have sworn by My holiness;
  I will not lie to David.
psalm-89-35.prayer: Lord, thank You that Your holiness guarantees the truthfulness of Your promises.

psalm-89-36.verse:
His descendants shall endure forever
  And his throne as the sun before Me.
psalm-89-36.prayer: Father, establish what You have spoken and let Your purposes endure.

psalm-89-37.verse:
It shall be established forever like the moon,
  And the witness in the sky is faithful.” Selah.
psalm-89-37.prayer: Lord, thank You for Your faithfulness that remains constant through every generation.

psalm-89-38.verse:
But You have cast off and rejected,
  You have been full of wrath against Your anointed.
psalm-89-38.prayer: Father, when circumstances seem to contradict Your promises, help me continue trusting You.

psalm-89-39.verse:
You have spurned the covenant of Your servant;
  You have profaned his crown in the dust.
psalm-89-39.prayer: Lord, when disappointment comes, keep my faith anchored in Your character.

psalm-89-40.verse:
You have broken down all his walls;
  You have brought his strongholds to ruin.
psalm-89-40.prayer: Father, when defenses seem broken, remind me that You remain my refuge.

psalm-89-41.verse:
All who pass along the way plunder him;
  He has become a reproach to his neighbors.
psalm-89-41.prayer: Lord, protect me when I feel vulnerable and exposed to attack.

psalm-89-42.verse:
You have exalted the right hand of his adversaries;
  You have made all his enemies rejoice.
psalm-89-42.prayer: Father, when others seem to prosper unfairly, help me trust Your justice and timing.

psalm-89-43.verse:
You also turn back the edge of his sword
  And have not made him stand in battle.
psalm-89-43.prayer: Lord, strengthen me when I feel defeated and help me persevere.

psalm-89-44.verse:
You have made his splendor to cease
  And cast his throne to the ground.
psalm-89-44.prayer: Father, when my strength fails, remind me that Your power is sufficient.

psalm-89-45.verse:
You have shortened the days of his youth;
  You have covered him with shame. Selah.
psalm-89-45.prayer: Lord, help me use my days wisely and remain faithful through every season.

psalm-89-46.verse:
How long, O Lord?
  Will You hide Yourself forever?
  Will Your wrath burn like fire?
psalm-89-46.prayer: Father, when I wonder how long difficulty will last, renew my hope in You.

psalm-89-47.verse:
Remember what my span of life is;
  For what vanity You have created all the sons of men!
psalm-89-47.prayer: Lord, remind me of the brevity of life and help me live with eternal perspective.

psalm-89-48.verse:
What man can live and not see death?
  Can he deliver his soul from the power of Sheol? Selah.
psalm-89-48.prayer: Father, thank You for the salvation that delivers from death and gives eternal hope.

psalm-89-49.verse:
Where are Your former lovingkindnesses, O Lord,
  Which You swore to David in Your faithfulness?
psalm-89-49.prayer: Lord, help me remember Your past faithfulness when present circumstances seem uncertain.

psalm-89-50.verse:
Remember, O Lord, the reproach of Your servants;
  How I bear in my bosom the reproach of all the many peoples,
psalm-89-50.prayer: Father, see every burden I carry and strengthen me when I feel discouraged.

psalm-89-51.verse:
With which Your enemies have reproached, O Lord,
  With which they have reproached the footsteps of Your anointed.
psalm-89-51.prayer: Lord, when others mock faith or question Your promises, help me remain steadfast.

psalm-89-52.verse:
Blessed be the Lord forever!
  Amen and Amen.
psalm-89-52.prayer: Father, blessed be Your name forever. Let praise remain on my lips regardless of my circumstances.

psalm-89-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for Your faithfulness, lovingkindness, and unchanging promises. When circumstances are confusing or difficult, help me trust Your character more than what I see. Teach me to walk faithfully, receive Your correction with humility, and remember Your goodness through every season. Let my life continually praise You, knowing that Your covenant love never fails and Your promises remain true forever.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
